hero.title: Build your next project
hero.description: A production-ready Next.js 16 starter kit with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, dark mode, and i18n support. Everything you need to ship fast.

features.title: Everything you need
features.description: A carefully curated set of tools and patterns for building modern web applications.

nextjs.title: Next.js 16
nextjs.description: App Router, Server Components, and the latest React features out of the box.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Full type safety across your entire codebase with strict mode enabled.

shadcn.title: shadcn/ui
shadcn.description: Beautiful, accessible components that you own and can customize freely.

darkmode.title: Dark Mode
darkmode.description: Seamless dark/light mode switching with system preference detection.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with next-intl. Korean and English included.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Layout
dashboard.description: Responsive sidebar navigation with collapsible menu and breadcrumbs.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.monthlyDescription: Performance metrics for the past 8 months
